forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. The chance of fog early this morning. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then turning south to southeasterly in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning and early afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog early this morning. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog early this morning. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the north in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending southerly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the west. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Areas of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending southerly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the west early this morning. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 30.
Sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the day then tending northeast to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.

Mostly sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Patchy fog early this morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming north to northwesterly and light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 27 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 34.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 19 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 30s.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 36.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 36.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.
